chunks.text:
H. No. 592 / 55 OG No. 36, 7626 (September 7, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2469, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIOS OF QUEZON HINAONAWAN, CAPOTO-AN, VICTORY, SAN JORGE, STO. TOMAS, BALUGO, QUIRINO, CATO-TO-GAN, TAGAN-AYAN, HAÃGI, GEGUINTA, ROXAS, SAN ANDRES, SAN JOSE, DEL PILAR, JOLEJOLE, EPAO, SAN ISIDRO, BUGAY, LOURDES, LAKANDOLA, MATELARAG AND SAN FERNANDO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LAS NAVAS, PROVINCE OF SAMAR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
